mechanism_narrative: A 5-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in the housing starts rate above 1.5 million signals a strengthening housing market that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in strengthening housing market periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 4-month decline in the real GDP rate below 2% signals a weakening supply environment that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in the real personal spending rate above 3% signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the initial unemployment claims rate below 200,000 signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in the consumer price index above 2% signals a strengthening inflation environment that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in strengthening inflation periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the real GDP rate above 3% and a 2-month increase in the housing starts rate above 1.5 million signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
